hero.headline: The Art of Detail.
hero.subheadline: Your premium grooming experience. The pinnacle of modern hairstyling and traditional shaving in the heart of Marrakech.

services.subtitle: Our Services
services.title: The Art of Grooming
services.desc: Discover our premium service menu. From timeless haircuts to classic hot towel shaves, every service is a tailored experience.

coupe.name: Bespoke Haircut
coupe.desc: Consultation, refreshing shampoo, precision cut using scissors or clippers, styling, and a premium finish.

barbe.name: Beard Sculpting
barbe.desc: Precision lining, scissor trimming, straight-razor contouring, and application of nourishing beard oil.

proteine.name: Protein Treatment
proteine.desc: Deep repairing and smoothing treatment for silky, glossy, and perfectly manageable hair.

gommage.name: Purifying Facial Scrub
gommage.desc: Gentle exfoliation to remove dead cells, cleanse pores, and brighten your complexion, finished with a relaxing massage.

pack.title: The Complete Package
pack.desc: The ultimate grooming journey. A moment of pure relaxation combining our finest expert treatments for an immaculate result.

philosophy.subtitle: Our Philosophy
philosophy.title: The Heritage of Craftsmanship
philosophy.desc1: At Barber Chehban, we don't just cut hair. We uphold a tradition of absolute excellence where every detail matters.
philosophy.desc2: Our shop in Massira 2 is envisioned as a true modern gentlemen's club. It's a space where technical mastery meets impeccable service in a luxurious, laid-back atmosphere.

team.subtitle: Our Expertise
team.title: The Master Barbers
team.desc: Passionate artisans and masters in the art of haircutting and traditional shaving. Meet the talent dedicated to elevating your style.

gallery.subtitle: The Lookbook
gallery.title: Our Creations
gallery.desc: A glimpse into our craftsmanship. Every haircut and treatment is executed with surgical precision for an uncompromising finish.

location.subtitle: Find Us
location.title: The Barbershop
location.desc: Located in the heart of Massira 2, our barbershop welcomes you to an elegant, masculine space designed for your utmost comfort.

booking.subtitle: Book an Appointment
booking.title: Reserve Your Slot
booking.desc: Connect directly with our team on WhatsApp for instant confirmation. Excellence shouldn't wait.

form.whatsapp_message: Hello, I would like to book an appointment with {barber} on {date} at {time}. Name: {name}. Phone: {phone}

footer.desc: The ultimate destination for discerning gentlemen in Marrakech. Haircuts, beard grooming, and premium treatments in an exclusive setting.
